summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All feedback form features verified: 5-question form UI renders correctly, star ratings with hover effects work, validation for mandatory fields (Q1-Q4) works, optional Q5 works, backend API accepts structured feedback body, feedback stored correctly in DB with all fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Feedback form UI correctly implements all 5 questions as specified
Q1 and Q2 use FeedbackRatingQuestion component with hover effects and rating labels (Poor/Fair/Good/Very Good/Excellent)
Q3 has 4 sub-items (self_awareness, experimental, goals, go_beyond) with individual star ratings
Q4 is mandatory textarea, Q5 is optional with '(Optional)' label
Frontend validation shows appropriate toast errors for each missing mandatory field
Backend FeedbackBody model correctly validates all required fields
Feedback stored in DB with correct structure: overall_rating, coach_rating, learning_outcomes (object), most_valuable, suggestions

context_for_next_testing_agent: Feedback form fully tested. Alex Morgan (alex@elevate.com) has a completed journey that can be used for feedback testing. Reset feedback_submitted to false in DB to re-test. All 5 questions work: Q1 overall rating (1-5), Q2 coach rating (1-5), Q3 learning outcomes (4 sub-items), Q4 most valuable (mandatory text), Q5 suggestions (optional text). Backend validates all required fields and stores structured feedback in 'feedback' collection.
